name: Sarah
description: A paramedic in a bloodstained hi-vis jacket, triaging strangers out of habit even now.
background: Ran the ambulance service out of the Rivermouth clinic until the roads stopped meaning anything.
personality: Steady, wry, and constitutionally unable to walk past someone who is hurt.
secret: She left a colleague behind on the last run and tells herself he made it out.

knowledge.hint: Before the roads closed I ran supplies out of Mercy Hospital — the pharmacy wing had a stockroom nobody ever cleared. If you can reach the hospital, it's worth the trip.

notes: T53 · Rivermouth · Harbor Holdout. FR-NPC-06 lead reveals the Mercy pharmacy wing (a real, lootable node) — she knows the hospital from her ambulance days.
